original_hypothesis.title: Timelock Bypass via TIMELOCK_ADMIN_ROLE Privilege Escalation
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: The `TaikoTimelockController` overrides `getMinDelay()` to return `0` if the caller has the `TIMELOCK_ADMIN_ROLE`. This completely defeats the purpose of the timelock, as any address with this role can execute scheduled operations immediately in the same block. If the Security Council (or any admin) key is compromised, the attacker can instantly upgrade core contracts or change critical parameters to drain all bridged assets, giving users zero time to react.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: While the Security Council is trusted, the purpose of a timelock is to provide defense-in-depth and user exit windows even if the admin keys are compromised. Bypassing the delay for admins nullifies this core security property.
preconditions: Attacker compromises an address with TIMELOCK_ADMIN_ROLE (e.g., Security Council multisig)

initial_economic_evidence.manipulation_vector: Attacker schedules and executes a malicious upgrade in a single transaction
initial_economic_evidence.profit_hypothesis: Attacker drains all L1 bridge liquidity instantly

economic_questions: Is there any secondary delay mechanism in the Governor contract?
Can the admin role be separated from the execution role?
validation_requirements: Verify that OpenZeppelin's TimelockController allows same-block execution if delay is 0
Check if the Security Council is an EOA or a strict multisig

preliminary_attack_economics.potential_profit_range: Total Value Locked (TVL) in the Bridge and Vaults

market_conditions_analysis.optimal_timing: Any time after TVL reaches a profitable threshold

potential_victim_impact.direct_victims: All L2 users and liquidity providers

investigation_priorities.parameter_analysis: Review role assignments in deployment scripts

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
